overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person walk along a futuristic city sidewalk during golden hour. The player character walks past pedestrians and vehicles along an elevated walkway, passes a massive circular billboard structure, and continues through a palm-lined urban street toward a concrete overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with metal railing overlooking city

events.description: silver car drives past on the right side road
passing two pedestrians walking in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated sidewalk toward large circular billboard structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with bright pink hair walking toward camera
pedestrian in dark clothing walking away from camera

entered.detail: large cylindrical tower with rotating digital advertisement screens
tall modern glass building with 07 marking visible on facade
green painted metal railing along walkway edge
large digital screen displaying colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated concrete sidewalk with a metal safety railing on the left, approaching a massive cylindrical billboard structure. The golden hour sun illuminates the scene as vehicles pass on the multi-lane road to the right, and pedestrians walk in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular advertising tower with panoramic city overlook

events.description: walking alongside and under the circular billboard structure
view opens to reveal lower city district with industrial smoke and buildings

agents.ego_description: walking past the circular structure while observing the lower city district

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green jacket walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: panoramic view of lower city with industrial buildings and smoke stacks
rusty corrugated metal rooftops of lower structures

segments.scene_description: Passing alongside the massive circular billboard structure, the camera reveals a sweeping view of the lower city district with industrial smoke and corrugated metal rooftops. The path continues along the elevated walkway as the cylindrical tower moves to the right side of the frame.

events.description: transitioning from elevated walkway to palm tree lined street level
white van and black truck pass by on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk passing palm trees and commercial storefronts

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the sidewalk edge
single-story commercial buildings with storefronts and signage
wooden utility poles with overhead electrical wires

segments.scene_description: Moving past the circular structure into a palm tree lined commercial street. The sidewalk is bordered by single-story commercial buildings on the right and utility poles with overhead power lines. Vehicles continue to pass on the adjacent road as the path continues toward a distant overpass.

events.description: approaching large concrete highway overpass ahead
walking under the overpass with temporary shadow and cover

agents.ego_description: walking toward and passing under the concrete overpass structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking ahead toward underpass

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass spanning across the street ahead
weathered wooden power pole with transformer equipment

segments.scene_description: Approaching and passing under a large concrete highway overpass that casts shadows across the path. The surrounding area features commercial buildings and utility poles, with palm trees now behind. The segment ends as the camera emerges from under the overpass into the continuing urban street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along an elevated urban walkway that transitions from a wide city vista into a shaded commercial district. It begins on a concrete sidewalk bordered by a metal railing, moving through the golden hour light past pedestrians and flowing traffic toward a massive cylindrical billboard. As the camera passes this circular structure, the view opens up to reveal a sweeping panorama of the lower city's industrial rooftops and smoke before the tower shifts to the right of the frame. The scene then shifts into a palm-lined commercial street characterized by single-story buildings and overhead power lines, continuing forward as the open sunlight begins to fade. Finally, the camera moves under a heavy concrete highway overpass, passing through a stretch of deep shadow before emerging back into the bright urban street.
